title: viola × rhaetica
intro: Viola × rhaetica, also known as the hybrid pansy, is a plant that belongs to the violet family (Violaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Viola × rhaetica include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Viola × rhaetica typically include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to address various health concerns.
